pages.text: Bearer of misfortune, disease and death.

pages.title: Lilith
pages.text: Lilith is a figure who crops up throughout folklore in various incarnations. She is purported to be the origin of the vampire curse, it being her $(l:artifacts/misc/bottle_of_lilith_blood)Blood$(/l) that taints the original vampire in any family. Many have sought out her favor, only to disappear during the journey. It is rumored that she will grant a boon to whoever proves themselves worthy.
